metadata.title: AMR solutions | Precision Informatics for Sustainable Agriculture
metadata.description: Offline-first AIoT platform for autonomous irrigation, predictive maintenance, and 3D Digital Twin farm simulations. Engineered for harsh environments in Tunisia and beyond.

hero.subtitle: AMR solutions delivers an offline-first AIoT platform engineered for harsh environments. Optimize your water resources, protect your yields, and simulate operations with our 3D Digital Twin.
hero.waterEfficiencyNote: vs. baseline drip scheduling · 14-day rolling average

solutions.title: Three layers. One precision stack.
solutions.subtitle: From harsh-field edge compute to enterprise analytics and immersive informatics—AMR solutions unifies the full irrigation lifecycle under a single, offline-resilient architecture.

edge.title: Edge Intelligence
edge.description: Solar-powered LoRa field nodes, industrial RS485 capacitance probes, and an ESP32-S3 gateway automate your fields locally—even when connectivity drops to zero. Irrigation decisions, valve actuation, and soil-moisture thresholds execute on-device without cloud dependency.
highlights: LoRa mesh with sub-kilowatt solar nodes

enterprise.title: Enterprise Core
enterprise.description: A hardened Spring Boot backbone ingests telemetry at scale, runs real-time ML predictive maintenance on pumps and solenoids, and surfaces anomaly scores before equipment failure interrupts a critical irrigation window.

informatics.title: Precision Informatics
informatics.description: A Next.js 3D Digital Twin lets you walk your parcel virtually, stress-test irrigation scenarios, and pair insights with an LLM Crop Advisor—delivering tailored agronomy guidance through our mobile experience.

competitive.title: Built for autonomy. Not dashboards.
competitive.subtitle: Legacy IoT stacks fail when connectivity does. Standard drip systems never simulate, predict, or advise. AMR solutions closes every gap.
competitive.footnote: AMR solutions is the only stack combining offline edge autonomy, 3D simulation, and generative agronomy in one deployable platform.

offline.amr: Full edge logic — irrigation continues without cloud

simulation.amr: Yes — interactive Digital Twin per parcel

quote.title: Configure your field infrastructure
quote.subtitle: Enter your parcel parameters and receive a real-time baseline layout for gateways, LoRa arrays, and node density—before we finalize your blueprint.
quote.parcelHint: All fields update your estimate instantly
quote.layoutFormula: 1 hectare = 1 ESP32-S3 gateway + 3 LoRa node arrays
quote.disclaimer: Final probe depth, valve zoning, and pump integration are calibrated during on-site survey. This estimate reflects our standard deployment density for {crop} under {water} conditions.
quote.prefillEstimate: Est. {hectares} ha — {gateways} gateway(s), {arrays} LoRa arrays ({nodes} nodes)

about.title: Engineering water intelligence from the ground up
about.paragraph1: AMR solutions is a Tunisia-born agritech venture building end-to-end precision irrigation for olive groves, date palms, citrus belts, and high-value horticulture. We fuse edge hardware, enterprise ML, and immersive informatics so growers command every drop—online or completely offline.
about.paragraph2: Our team spans embedded systems, hydraulics, and agronomic data science. We deploy where connectivity is unreliable and water is scarce, because that is where precision agriculture matters most.

startupAct.title: Tunisian Startup Act
startupAct.description: Incorporated and operating in full compliance with Tunisia's Startup Act framework—eligible for innovation incentives and cross-border scaling pathways.

sustainable.title: Sustainable by design
sustainable.description: Solar-powered nodes, targeted irrigation, and predictive maintenance reduce energy waste and extend equipment life across multi-hectare deployments.

enterprise.title: Enterprise-ready delivery
enterprise.description: From pilot parcels to cooperative-scale rollouts—we provide formal blueprints, SLA-backed support, and integration with existing pump and reservoir infrastructure.

waitlist.title: Join the precision pipeline
waitlist.subtitle: Be among the first growers to deploy AMR solutions across Tunisia. Our informatics team will contact you with a custom land configuration and deployment timeline.
waitlist.successMessage: Thank you! You have been added to the AMR solutions early-access pipeline. A precision informatics expert will reach out regarding your custom land configuration.

footer.copyright: © 2026 AMR solutions. Precision Informatics for Sustainable Agriculture.
footer.compliance: AMR solutions operates in compliance with the Tunisian Startup Act, supporting innovation-driven agritech deployment across the Republic of Tunisia and the broader MENA region.
